title: rubus × rarus
intro: Rubus × rarus, also known as the raspberry hybrid or thimbleberry, is a cross between the wild raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Rubus × rarus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Rubus × rarus can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its numerous health benefits.
